highlights: 4+ years of experience
3 companies, 6+ apps shipped
Android · iOS · Flutter
Mobile · Window · MacOS
8.2 CGPA — B.Tech CSE

experience.summary: Revamped end-to-end booking & payment flow for 1.7L+ users (3–4K DAU).
highlights: Delivered complete app revamp in 15 days for the 26 Jan release under strict timeline with AI tool adaptation
Built and scaled a support chat system, improving engagement and reducing support friction
Improved payment reliability (JusPay) by resolving critical issues in transaction flow and receipt handling
Implemented A/B testing for booking flow, enabling data-driven UX improvements
Developed installation & router recovery flows, improving onboarding success
Reduced app size from 35MB → 15MB, improving install rate and performance
Resolved ANR/crash issues and optimised performance, improving overall app stability

experience.summary: Delivered 3 key apps across Android, iOS & Flutter Desktop, boosting user engagement 40%.

Optimised widget rebuilds with typedef, callbacks & BLoC, improving app speed significantly
Built a custom walkthrough widget, increasing first-time user adoption 25%
Implemented video & PDF watermarking + encryption, cutting unauthorised sharing 70%
Created backend-driven widget builder, shortening release cycles 30%
Enabled native DRM-secure video playback across Android/iOS/macOS with zero lag
Added widget-to-PDF/JPG convertor and seamless sharing, improving app utility
Integrated secure payment gateways, raising in-app course purchases 15%
Built custom iOS views with graphical stats to enhance learner analytics

experience.summary: Led complete app overhaul using Redux + MVC, reducing defects 30%.
highlights: Led complete app overhaul using Redux + MVC, reducing defects 30%
Developed 3–4 modules independently, cutting time-to-market 20%
Integrated Native Views & React website via JS Channels, speeding interactions 25%

projects.title: Vendor Tracker
projects.subtitle: Real-time workforce management & field ops app
projects.description: A robust Android application for real-time workforce management — task assignment, attendance tracking, live location monitoring, and quotation handling. Built with Jetpack Compose and Appwrite as backend.
highlights: Role-based auth — Admin (full control) and User (task-scoped) roles with secure session management
24/7 live location tracking with lat/long/timestamp; admin map dashboard shows real-time positions and history
Task lifecycle management — Admin assigns with due dates, User accepts/starts/completes with push notifications
Dynamic quotation forms — configurable by admin, submitted by users, exportable from dashboard
Attendance module with login/logout tracking, working hours calculation, and monthly calendar summaries
Foreground location service with AlarmManager for reliable background tracking
Firebase Cloud Messaging for real-time task assignment and reminder push notifications

projects.title: Cognix
projects.subtitle: Psychometric visual-motor reaction time test
projects.description: A Flutter-based psychometric test that simulates a train approaching a tunnel — the user must stop the train as accurately as possible when it aligns with the tunnel opening. Inspired by assessments used in cognitive science, driver training, and attention evaluation.
highlights: Train approaches from a random side each round — tests symmetrical attention and spatial perception
Tap or spacebar input — works on both mobile touch and desktop keyboard
Scoring system from 1–10 per round based on pixel-accurate proximity to tunnel center
10 rounds per session with real-time visual feedback after each stop
Custom canvas rendering via CustomPainter — no game engine dependency
AnimationController-driven train movement with dart:ui for image rendering
Reusable widget architecture isolating left/right direction variants
metrics: In review — App Store & Play Store

projects.title: Feature Walkthrough
projects.subtitle: Quadrant-aware onboarding overlay package
projects.description: A flexible Flutter package for in-app feature discovery and onboarding overlays. Highlights any widget with a positioned tooltip, automatically calculating the optimal quadrant (top/bottom/left/right) based on where the target sits on screen.
highlights: GlobalKey + RenderObject used to locate target widget position at runtime with pixel precision
Quadrant-based positioning — overlay auto-places in the opposite screen quadrant to avoid occlusion
Step chaining via id/nextId — walkthroughs flow across multiple screens without manual coordination
WalkThroughNotifier singleton ensures each step is shown only once; persists across sessions
Fully customizable title, description, and display widget per step
Responsive across screen sizes — adapts layout based on available space
Used in production at VisionIAS — drove +25% first-time feature adoption
